{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321131435233B9D5480493AA70DB2"}"},"total":29},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602528633570034456","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看！好看！内容很新颖，还有我喜欢的红包群金手指，期待作者大大的更新[求爆更]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770105423,"group_id":"7601762265594858520","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"善良而狡猾的活着","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2e7S4oAmVF6WZIHiv0VndA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4a328cd609ce477c941e01e06348ed8c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623474&x-signature=%2BbmpslISOF4NRi54zVTEqT8JQ8c%3D","user_id":"676895762431747","user_name":"烤多多"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"676895762431747","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601762265594858520","book_info":{"abstract":"阮棠做梦都没想到她竟然英年早逝了！峰回路转又变相实现了永生！
她从小是个孤儿，好不容易靠着写小说实现财富自由，有车有房有闲开始享受生活。
谁知道这一切都被一个突然窜出来的骑着三轮车的大妈毁了！
好在有个萌新系统绑定了她，只是整个系统感觉有些不太聪明的样子。
不是这生子丹，生女丹.....这些丹药怎么感觉像是古代生活需要的样子！
她不想去啊，但是现在没得选了，先去试试看吧，生活所迫嘛。
第一个世界：孝懿仁皇后——佟佳氏
第二个世界：庶妃张氏
.........
一个世界又一个世界过去，她觉得自己怎么就和清朝杠上了！爷孙三代的后宫她都去过！
虽然这些都不是正史甚至有些还是影视剧里的平行世界，但是在这里赚取功德是真的快啊，她勉强接受了吧。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/74685c502b1b339672789c3c58ec1667","author":"星河碾月","author_id":"","book_id":"7601762265594858520","book_name":"快穿之我在清朝做任务","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":247,"name":"医术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=247&name=医术&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601762418254938648","read_count":"34309","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"200710"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"98","tags":"快穿,古代言情,系统,幻想言情,医术","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o062909e1a529356d6f4d87807bf9d3ce~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254075&x-signature=99t%2FV3l%2B74apuWUCVbiw8hzprC0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6965284508","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321131435233B9D5480493AA70DB2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1792},"user_action":{"aut
